---
title: "Advancing Our Understanding Of Mesotheriid Feeding Ecology"
date: "2024-01-01"
author: "Kornelius Florian Kupczik"
departamento: "Antropología"
categories: ["Fondecyt Regular"]
keywords: ["PALEOECOLOGY FEEDING MECHANICS TOOTH WEAR"]
concurso: "Fondecyt Regular"
codigo_proyecto: "1240805"
fecha_inicio: "2024"
fecha_termino: "2028"
duracion: "48 meses"
url_abstract: "https://post.anid.cl/frontend.php/es/postulacion/descargar/hash/a613e80ae824379aeabde61ee0f70edf"
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: file-text
      href: https://post.anid.cl/frontend.php/es/postulacion/descargar/hash/a613e80ae824379aeabde61ee0f70edf
---
